scope_summary: Subsidiary legislation under the Building Act 2011 prescribing the operational detail of WA's building control system: applications for building and demolition permits, certificates of design compliance, applicable building standards (adopting the Building Code / NCC with WA modifications, including bush fire prone area and swimming pool barrier standards), occupancy permits, fees, and infringement notices. Part 8 imposes retrospective requirements on existing buildings, notably private swimming pool barriers (Division 2) and smoke alarms prior to transfer, rent or hire of dwellings (Division 3). Schedule 4 lists building work exempt from a building permit. Applies state-wide in Western Australia.
